population: People of any age with a rash temporally associated with a medicine; pregnancy, children, anaphylaxis, severe cutaneous reactions, infection, and immune status require qualified assessment.
setting: UAE primary, emergency, inpatient, outpatient dermatology, and specialist-allergy documentation.
